name: Grandma's Oatmeal Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Insert pan into the machine and close the lid.
2. Select "Basic White Bread" setting and medium baking degree setting.
3. The bread is a very large loaf. On my machine, it hit the top of the lid while rising, but baked just fine.
4. Use the "light" setting to avoid issues during baking.
